# cgo files are rejected conservatively. The preamble before import "C" is
# file-sensitive, so moving declarations out of it mechanically is unsafe.

! exec sflit -source cgo.go -sink small.go -regex '^UseC$' -move
stderr 'cannot \w+ declarations out of cgo file'
cmp cgo.go expected_cgo.go
! exists small.go

-- cgo.go --
package p

/*
#include <stdlib.h>
*/
import "C"

func UseC() int { return int(C.size_t(1)) }
-- expected_cgo.go --
package p

/*
#include <stdlib.h>
*/
import "C"

func UseC() int { return int(C.size_t(1)) }
